# ADR Template

## ADR Number
`ADR-xxxx`

## Title

## Status
Proposed / Approved / Deprecated / Superseded

## Date

## Owner

## Supersedes

## Superseded By

## Related Domains

## Context
Describe the architectural context and problem space.

## Decision
Document the decision that is being made.

## Alternatives
List alternative options and why they were rejected.

## Chosen Solution
Describe the selected approach and why it was chosen.

## Reason
Explain the reasoning behind the decision.

## Consequences
List the expected impact and any trade-offs.

## Related Documents
Reference linked governance documents and domain artifacts.

## Notes
Add any additional notes, references, or next steps.
